content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves sharply to the left ahead with the right boundary (white/grey) visible close by, and the car appears to be navigating through a tight left-hand bend.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 103, target index = (103+5) % 121 = 108
- WP108: x=1.125133, y=1.518646
- Car: x=0.996298, y=1.358223, heading=-86.502°
- dy = 1.518646 - 1.358223 = +0.160423
- dx = 1.125133 - 0.996298 = +0.128835
- bearing = atan2(0.160423, 0.128835): both positive → Q1
  - angle = atan(0.160423/0.128835) = atan(1.2452) ≈ 51.2° → bearing ≈ +51.2°
- delta = 51.2° - (-86.502°) = +137.7°
- Normalize: 137.7° in range → steer LEFT strongly

**Boundary check:**
- is_left_of_center = false (right of center)
- edge_distance = (0.7618/2) - 0.1599 = 0.3809 - 0.1599 = 0.221m → OK (>0.20m)
- delta = +137.7° → steer left (away from right edge) → safe

|delta| > 50°: speed=0.75, steering_angle=+25.0

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Sharp left curve continues ahead with car right of center; delta≈+137.7° requires maximum left steering to follow the curve and stay on track.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track total 121 waypoints, ~17.7m length.",
    "WP0-20: long straight along y≈0.683 heading east.",
    "WP24-44: left curve from east to west, requires sustained positive steering.",
    "WP44-55: straight westward along y≈2.77.",
    "WP82-96: sharp south/southeast curve — large positive delta, need max left steering.",
    "WP97-110: heading ~-86 to -90°, sharp left turn continues — delta near +130-140°, use max steering_angle=+25 at speed=0.75.",
    "Car consistently right of center (distance_from_center ~0.16-0.18m) in WP100-108 region.",
    "When |delta|>50°, use steering_angle=+25 at speed=0.75.",
    "When |delta|<5°, use steering_angle=0 to avoid oscillation.",
    "Progress ~87% at step 182 — on track, continuing through sharp left curve."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [0.942, 0.956, 0.977, 0.996],
    "y": [1.492, 1.444, 1.395, 1.358],
    "heading": [-98.266, -94.702, -90.037, -86.502]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP108 at (1.125, 1.519): bearing≈+51.2°, delta≈+137.7° → maximum left correction needed.",
  "speed": 0.75,
  "steering_angle": 25.0
}
```
